antithesis_summary: Remove value embeddings and trust plain attention plus residual mixing to optimize more cleanly inside the same 300-second budget.
label: Value embeddings vs simplicity
thesis_summary: Keep alternating value embeddings because the only completed best-in-class run on this axis used them and may have benefited from extra per-token value pathways.
why_active: The best completed run used alternating value embeddings, while the current branch baseline removes them entirely. This session needs a clean first measurement before deciding whether that roughly 16.8M-parameter novelty was genuinely useful or just short-run clutter.
